source_title: REGENETEN Advanced Healing Solutions - clinical evidence collection
text: Evidence in focus Collection of evidence ADVANCED HEALING ROTATOR CUFF REPAIR SOLUTIONS Biological Portfolio • REGENETEN◊ Bioinductive Implant • HEALICOIL◊ REGENESORB◊ Suture Anchor • HEALICOIL KNOTLESS Suture Anchor • REGENESORB Material May 2025 Collection of Evidence This evidence collection summarises the clinical evidence on the ADVANCED HEALING SOLUTIONS portfolio Click the products below to view the product summary Redefining biological healing for rotator cuff repair Navigation tips Key to icons Overview arrows at the bottom of each page will take you to the previous or subsequent page, as indicated →→ Full summary will take you to the Evidence in focus full summary of the relevant study Published paper will take you to the journal website where the study is publishedBiopsyImaging outcomes Patient outcomes Biomechanical Smith+Nephew ADVANCED HEALING SOLUTIONS Interactivity has been included throughout the collection to aid navigation will take you to a table of evidence, organised by product. Key evidence is represented in light blue and supporting evidence in brown Table of contents REGENETEN ◊ Bioinductive Implant Collection of Evidence Author Key finding Key evidence Arnoczky SP , et al. 20171 REGENETEN Implant was rapidly absorbed and replaced by tendon-like tissue within 6 months Bokor DJ, et al. 2016 2 REGENETEN Implant promoted rapid and sustained healing of partial-thickness (PT) rotator cuff tears Bokor DJ, et al. 2019 3 No decline in tendon integrity between 2 and 5 years post-operatively for most patients treated with the REGENETEN Implant Bushnell BD, et al. 2021 4 REGENETEN Implant led to significantly improved pain, shoulder function and HRQoL at 3, 6 and 12 months in patients with PT rotator cuff tears Camacho Chacón JA, et al. 20245 Isolated bioinductive repair using the REGENETEN Implant resulted in significantly faster recovery compared to sutured repair Camacho Chacón JA, et al. 20226 REGENETEN Implant led to high healing rates and implant integration with full-thickness (FT) and PT rotator cuff tears Ruiz Ibán M, et al. 2023 7 Use of REGENETEN Implant to augment repair of medium and large FT rotator cuff tears resulted in significantly lower re-tear rates compared with repair alone Schlegel TF , et al. 20208 REGENETEN Implant reduced the size of PT rotator cuff tears by over 50% in all tear locations Thon SG, et al. 2019 9 REGENETEN Implant led to tissue induction and high rates of tendon healing in large and massive rotator cuff tears Click on the arrow by the study reference to view the study overview. Table of contents Smith+Nephew ADVANCED HEALING SOLUTIONS Key to icons FT tears PT tears FT+PT tears Pre-clinical Not applicable (NA) Imaging outcomes Patient outcomes Biopsy Biomechanical Key REGENETEN ◊ Bioinductive Implant Collection of Evidence Author Key finding Supporting evidence Bokor DJ, et al. 2015 10 REGENETEN Implant maintained repair integrity in FT rotator cuff tears Bushnell BD, et al. 2022 11 REGENETEN Implant used in the repair of medium-sized and large FT rotator cuff tears led to low re-tear rates at 24 months Dai AZ, et al. 2020 12 REGENETEN Implant led to significant post-operative improvements in pain and function in an independent case series of PT rotator cuff tears McIntyre L, et al. 2019 13 REGENETEN Implant led to clinically meaningful improvements in pain and function for patients with PT and FT rotator cuff tears McIntyre LF , et al. 202114 REGENETEN Implant resulted in significant improvements in pain, shoulder function and HRQoL at 12 months in FT rotator cuff tears Click on the arrow by the study reference to view the study overview. Supporting Smith+Nephew ADVANCED HEALING SOLUTIONS Table of contents Key to icons FT tears PT tears FT+PT tears Pre-clinical Not applicable (NA)Imaging outcomes Patient outcomes Biopsy Biomechanical HEALICOIL ◊ Suture Anchors Collection of Evidence Author Key finding Key evidence Chahla J, et al. 2020 15 Significantly greater bone density surrounding HEALICOIL PK Suture Anchors versus TWINFIX◊ PK Suture Anchors 6 months after rotator cuff repair Clark TR, et al. 2016 16 Rotator cuff thickness significantly greater in patients who received vented compared with non-vented suture anchors at 6 weeks Yamauchi S, et al. 2021 17 HEALICOIL Suture Anchors resulted in the high load-to-failure when compared with a series of different suture anchors used in rotator cuff repair Click on the arrow by the study reference to view the study overview.
